description: Engagement (shiddukhin) agreement between Nissim Zeraḥya and Miryam bt. Shelomo ha-Levi. Dated 1749 CE (21 Heshvan 5510), Rashid. Currency: the gold zeri maḥbūb coin (זהובים מחבובים). The engagement is set to last for one year until the wedding. The two witness signatures are from Aharon Meyuḥas and David Ṭawīl. The bride's father has appointed Moshe Reʾuben to sign on his behalf as consenting party. Goitein's notes and index card linked below belong to a different shelfmark. ASE/MCD.
description_he: הסכם שידוכים בין ניסים זרחיה ומרים בת שלמה הלוי, רשיד, 1749
